checks.name: npm run validate
checks.evidence: 35 node tests passed; MDE parser checked 69 files; traceability validator checked 23 files and required IDs through GEN-018/SE-0003/ARCH-0.3-candidate/ADL-0003; fixture index check passed; fixture evaluation passed.

checks.name: npm run embed:cranfield -- --provider local-hash
checks.evidence: experiments/cranfield-v0/embeddings-local-hash-gen018.json records deterministic control embeddings for 1,400 documents and 225 queries.

checks.name: npm run eval:cranfield:vector
checks.evidence: experiments/cranfield-v0/evaluation-vector-local-hash-gen018.json records vector-only nDCG@10 0.1453 and best depth-50 hybrid nDCG@10 0.3052.

checks.name: npm run eval:cranfield:vector -- --vector-depth 100
checks.evidence: experiments/cranfield-v0/evaluation-vector-local-hash-depth100-gen018.json records best local-control hybrid nDCG@10 0.3054, still below refined PRF nDCG@10 0.3260.

checks.name: npm run eval:cranfield:vector -- --k 20 --relevance-mode binary
checks.evidence: experiments/cranfield-v0/evaluation-vector-local-hash-k20-binary-gen018.json records best local-control binary nDCG@20 0.4340, below refined PRF comparable nDCG@20 0.4563.

blocked_or_skipped.name: real LLM embedding generation
blocked_or_skipped.reason: No OPENAI_API_KEY or equivalent embedding provider key was configured.

blocked_or_skipped.name: remote OpenSearch vector index validation
blocked_or_skipped.reason: Deferred until an offline real-embedding run beats the current refined PRF candidate.

blocked_or_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
blocked_or_skipped.reason: No deployment was requested; GEN-018 leaves the public/default architecture unchanged.

high_findings.summary: ARCH-0.2-candidate refined prf-rerank remains candidate-only until BEIR transferability is measured.

medium_findings.summary: No real LLM embedding result exists yet because no embedding provider key was configured.

evidence_quality: GEN-018 validates the vector/hybrid experiment path and records local-control metrics. It does not prove LLM embeddings improve Cranfield; that requires a real provider-backed embedding artifact.
